# Throttle LK

> Throttle LK is a streetwear and rider culture brand based in Colombo, Sri Lanka. We sell bold, oversized hoodies and t-shirts, and are expanding into modified motorbike parts and riders' accessories under a new "Motor Garage" line. We deliver island-wide across Sri Lanka.

## About

- Brand name: Throttle LK
- Based in: Colombo, Sri Lanka
- Products today: Oversized streetwear hoodies and t-shirts, heavyweight cotton blend, sizes S–XXL
- Coming soon: "Motor Garage" — modified motorbike parts and riders' accessories (helmets, gloves, protective gear)
- Delivery: Island-wide across Sri Lanka, flat fee of LKR 450
- Ordering: Add to cart on the website, checkout is confirmed via WhatsApp + bank transfer
- Social: [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/share/18qA9nBdVh/?mibextid=wwXIfr), [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@throttle_lk)

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://throttlelk.online/): Shop hoodies & t-shirts, brand story, FAQ, Motor Garage preview
- [Sitemap](https://throttlelk.online/sitemap.xml): Full list of product pages
